# make_solver { #reactix.make_solver }

```python
make_solver(
    t_max,
    t_points,
    rtol=1e-08,
    atol=1e-08,
    solver=None,
    t0=0,
    dt0=None,
    device=None,
)
```

Create a JIT-compiled solver function for reactix simulations.

This function sets up a differential equation solver using diffrax to solve
either a TransportSystem or a MixedSystem over time.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type                   | Description                                         | Default    |
|----------|------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|------------|
| t_max    | float                  | Maximum simulation time.                            | _required_ |
| t_points | jax.Array              | Time points at which to save the solution.          | _required_ |
| rtol     | float                  | Relative tolerance for the solver. Default is 1e-8. | `1e-08`    |
| atol     | float                  | Absolute tolerance for the solver. Default is 1e-8. | `1e-08`    |
| solver   | diffrax.AbstractSolver | ODE solver to use. Default is Tsit5.                | `None`     |
| t0       | float                  | Initial time. Default is 0.                         | `0`        |
| dt0      | float                  | Initial time step. Default is None (auto).          | `None`     |
| device   | jax.Device             | JAX device to run on. Default is CPU.               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type     | Description                                                                |
|--------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| solve  | callable | JIT-compiled function that takes initial state and args, returns solution. |

## Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

The returned solver function has signature solve(y0, args) where y0 is the
initial species concentrations and args are additional arguments passed to
the RHS function.
